title: Gen AI Remake
description: AI-generated remake of a classic scene or concept. Before/after transformation style with glitch and AI visual effects.
prompt: Create a before/after transformation. Start with original style, transition through AI processing effects (glitch, pixel sort, neural style), reveal the AI remake. Show the transformation as a journey.
cut_style: Eisenstein overtonal. Conflict between old/new, analog/digital. Glitch transitions, datamosh effects, hard juxtapositions.
